query: Ukraine drone campaign Russian oil refineries strike rate June July 2026 - how many refinery strikes per month, is the campaign continuing to intensify, Moscow region drone attacks frequency
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on Ukraine's drone campaign against Russian oil refineries in June–July 2026:

**Strike rate:** Ukraine struck **11 refineries in June 2026** (per Ukraine's MoD), roughly one every ~2.7 days. Carnegie independently logged **26 refinery attacks in April–May 2026** (~13/month) — a sustained low-double-digit monthly pace matching the prior Aug–Sep 2025 peak.

**Intensifying?** Yes, clearly. Carnegie confirms "more drones reaching targets than ever," growing damage to complex refining units, and a strategic shift toward refineries themselves. Zelenskyy said on July 1 that Ukraine is "expanding" the campaign, which continued into July (Slavyansk-na-Kubani strike).

**Impact:** ~600,000 bpd knocked out mid-June (potentially ~28% capacity); gasoline output ~25% below prior-year June; Putin admitted a "certain deficit"; dozens of regions rationed fuel; Russia moved to import fuel.

**Moscow region:** Multiple major attacks — June 18 was the largest strike on Moscow since the invasion (~200 drones, all four airports closed), with repeat assaults June 16, 22, and other large barrages closing airports 3–4 times in a two-week span.

**Caveat:** Counts blend Ukrainian MoD (may overstate) and Russian/independent sources; Carnegie stresses Russia is "battered but not broken."

Full structured findings with all data points and sources have been recorded.
